children.label: A
children.text: deny to any individual the opportunity to become an adoptive or a foster parent, on the basis of the race, color, or national origin of the individual, or of the child, involved; or

children.label: B
children.text: delay or deny the placement of a child for adoption or into foster care, on the basis of the race, color, or national origin of the adoptive or foster parent, or the child, involved.

children.heading: Enforcement
children.label: 2 Enforcement
children.text: Noncompliance with paragraph (1) is deemed a violation of title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 [ et seq.].42 U.S.C. 2000d

children.heading: No effect on the Indian Child Welfare Act of 1978
children.label: 3 No effect on the Indian Child Welfare Act of 1978
children.text: This subsection shall not be construed to affect the application of the Indian Child Welfare Act of 1978 [ et seq.].25 U.S.C. 1901
